De'Sean Allen-Eikens

Position: Guard

6-6, 219lb (198cm, 99kg)

Hometown: Williston, ND

High School: Aspire Academy

Schools: North Dakota (Men), New Orleans (Men) and Cal State Northridge (Men)

  • 2023-24 All-Big West
  • 2024 All-Big West Tourney
